headline: Spotting Winners: Mondelez (NASDAQ:MDLZ) And Shelf-Stable Food Stocks In Q4
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Mondelez (NASDAQ:MDLZ) and the rest of the shelf-stable food stocks fared in Q4.
